title: Arithmetic sequence and partial sum
why_not_earlier_topic: T1 is the earliest Math AA topic area that contains the required solving method for this original item.
text: An arithmetic sequence has first term $3$ and common difference $4$.

parts.label: a
parts.text: Find an expression for the $n$th term $u_n$.

parts.label: b
parts.text: Find the smallest value of $n$ for which $S_n>180$.
parts.scheme: Use $S_n=\frac{n}{2}(2a+(n-1)d)$ and solve the resulting quadratic inequality.

solution.outline: Use the arithmetic sequence formula $u_n=a+(n-1)d$ and the partial-sum formula $S_n=\frac{n}{2}(2a+(n-1)d)$.

rows.text: Use $S_n=\frac{n}{2}(2a+(n-1)d)$ and solve the resulting quadratic inequality.

publication_review.classification_basis: official Math AA topic area, first assessment 2021
publication_review.student_surface: requires automated browser closeout after build

why_not_earlier_topic: T4 is the earliest Math AA topic area that contains the required solving method for this original item.
text: A random variable $X$ follows a binomial distribution with $n=11$ and $p=0.35$.

solution.outline: Use the binomial probability formula and the expected-value formula $E(X)=np$.

title: Differentiation and tangent line
why_not_earlier_topic: T5 is the earliest Math AA topic area that contains the required solving method for this original item.
text: The curve $C$ has equation $y=x^3-3x^2+2x+1$.

parts.label: b
parts.text: Find the equation of the tangent to $C$ at $x=1$.
parts.scheme: Find the gradient at $x=1$ and the point on $C$, then use $y-y_1=m(x-x_1)$.

solution.outline: Differentiate term by term, evaluate the derivative and function value at $x=1$, and write the tangent equation.
